programme.title: Cristiano de la Secreta
programme.desc: Eddie lleva una doble vida: es cristiano en el templo y aspira a ser un "chico malo" fuera de él. Quiere ser como alguien más, en este caso, "Papo", un niño consentido que siempre busca algo que hacer. En su intento de conquistar a la chica a la que le gusta, Debora pasa de una mentira a otra.

programme.title: La tercera edad
programme.desc: Arturo Garabito (Roberto Salcedo) y Nicolás Montes de Oca (Cuquin Victoria). Dos viejos amigos se inscriben en una universidad para adultos, en busca de aventura, amor y diversión. ¿Qué podría salir mal?

programme.title: El Brujo
programme.desc: Después de un incidente confuso, un hombre cristiano huye a la casa de su primo en el campo y se ve obligado a hacerse pasar por un adivino.

programme.title: Hermanos
programme.desc: Gemelos separados al nacer han seguido caminos muy diferentes: uno es un ejemplo de hombre familiar cristiano; el otro, un delincuente. Cuando se reencuentren por casualidad, una circunstancia inesperada hará que el gemelo malvado se haga pasar por el bueno.

programme.title: LOTOMAN 003
programme.desc: ¡Manuel y Modesto aceptan una propuesta inesperada y, al hacerlo, descubren el emocionante mundo de los Agentes Secretos! Pero durante la misión su integridad es puesta a prueba… Y Lotoman se da cuenta de que a veces resulta difícil hacer lo correcto.

programme.title: LOTOMAN The Movie
programme.desc: Modesto y Manuel son hermanos cuyas vidas cambian al ganar la lotería. La nueva vida tendrá situaciones divertidas que van junto con su nuevo estatus social.

programme.title: Infieles
programme.desc: Luisa engaña a Guillermo con Sebastián, quien engaña a Ximena. Cuando Luisa desaparece después de que ambas parejas regresan de una noche de doble cita, toda la casa de cartas comienza a desmoronarse.

programme.title: Tuberculo gourmet
programme.desc: El gran comedor Tubérculo y su vecino Tirson rompieron su amistad debido a un malentendido, pero 20 años después, un evento inesperado los vuelve a reunir.

programme.title: Azotes de Barrio
programme.desc: Donay es un joven que cumple la última parte de su condena en prisión. Conoce a Alicia y el chico empieza a soñar con un futuro diferente para él.

programme.title: Lotoman
programme.desc: Modesto y Manuel son hermanos cuyas vidas cambian al ganar la lotería. La nueva vida tendrá situaciones divertidas que van junto con su nuevo estatus social.

programme.title: La Tercera Edad
programme.desc: Arturo Garabito (Roberto Salcedo) y Nicolás Montes de Oca (Cuquin Victoria). Dos viejos amigos se inscriben en una universidad para adultos, en busca de aventura, amor y diversión. ¿Qué podría salir mal?

programme.title: Lotoman 003
programme.desc: ¡Manuel y Modesto aceptan una propuesta inesperada y, al hacerlo, descubren el emocionante mundo de los Agentes Secretos! Pero durante la misión su integridad es puesta a prueba… Y Lotoman se da cuenta de que a veces es difícil hacer lo correcto.

programme.title: Paracaidistas
programme.desc: Cuatro empleados de una fábrica de colchones tratan de romper un curioso récord: participar en cien fiestas a las que no han sido invitados. Su propósito principal es entretener a Leo, quien no supera la ruptura con su novia y —de paso— convertirse en rico y famoso.

programme.title: Cristiano de la secreta
programme.desc: Eddie lleva una doble vida: es cristiano en el templo y aspira a ser un "chico malo" fuera de él. Quiere ser como alguien más, en este caso, "Papo", un niño consentido que siempre busca algo que hacer. En su intento de conquistar a la chica a la que le gusta, Debora pasa de una mentira a otra.

programme.title: Corneador
programme.desc: Un abogado se convierte en un compañero pagado para las esposas de hombres ricos. A medida que cumple sus deseos, se involucra en fetiches de, lo que lleva a resultados inesperados.

programme.title: Hermanos
programme.desc: Gemelos separados al nacer han seguido caminos muy diferentes: uno es un ejemplo de hombre familiar cristiano; el otro, un delincuente. Cuando se reencuentren por casualidad, una circunstancia inesperada hará que el gemelo malvado se haga pasar por el bueno.

programme.title: Los Paracaidistas
programme.desc: Cuatro empleados de una fábrica de colchones tratan de romper un curioso récord: participar en cien fiestas a las que no han sido invitados. Su propósito principal es entretener a Leo, quien no supera la ruptura con su novia y —de paso— convertirse en rico y famoso.

programme.title: The Baron
programme.desc: Black actor tries to make his own movie with an all-black cast, but to make it he's forced to borrow money from the Mafia. Complications ensue.

programme.title: The Black Rebels (1960) Colorized
programme.desc: Damon's in black-face as blacks take on whites who take on Hispanics in this very entertaining teenage gang war extravaganza. Teenage punks slice and dice each other, turn innocent young girls into sleazy tramps, threaten innocent citizens, get involved in interracial romance, and sell drugs to local citizens. Whew! That's a lotta trashy behavior for one movie.

programme.title: Slavers
programme.desc: As the slave trade is dwindling in East Africa in the late 19th century, two competing slave traders start a brutal violent conflict between each other for the monopoly on the remaining profits.

programme.title: Mr Mean
programme.desc: A former Cosa Nostra henchman seeks greener pastures. Hiring himself out as a hit man, he immediately lands a job. His mission: wipe out his old boss.

programme.title: Speeding Up Time
programme.desc: A poet seeks revenge on the criminal responsible for the death of his mother.

programme.title: Get Christie Love
programme.desc: Adventures of sexy and sassy black undercover cop Christie Love.

programme.title: The Black Connection
programme.desc: Las Vegas drug dealer is in deep with the Italian mob over a large amount of missing cocaine. He must get creative to get out from under the mob before they take the ultimate course of action.

programme.title: The Legend Of Black Charley
programme.desc: A slave kills a white man in self-defense and heads West towards freedom, pursued by a professional slave hunter.

programme.title: The Black Rebels
programme.desc: Damon's in black-face as blacks take on whites who take on Hispanics in this very entertaining teenage gang war extravaganza. Teenage punks slice and dice each other, turn innocent young girls into sleazy tramps, threaten innocent citizens, get involved in interracial romance, and sell drugs to local citizens. Whew! That's a lotta trashy behavior for one movie.

programme.title: Black Fist
programme.desc: To make money, a Los Angeles street-fighter goes to work for gangsters.

programme.title: Life With Elizabeth - S1E09: 1. Learning to Drive Day 2. The Day They Moved In 3. Alvin Asks the Boss Home
programme.desc: The day to day events in the lives of a newly married couple. Each episode consists of three short, unrelated sketches in which characters often break the imaginary fourth wall. 1. Learning to Drive Day 2. The Day They Moved In 3. Alvin Asks the Boss Home

programme.title: Date With The Angels - S1E12: Pike's Pique
programme.desc: The Time: 6 months after Vickie and Gus are married. Vicki and Gus visit an amusement park and run into their neighbors. With misunderstandings and dogs aplenty.

programme.title: Date With The Angels - S1E04: The Wheel
programme.desc: Vicki's teenage nephew sets the house on its ear.

programme.title: Life With Elizabeth - S1E04: 1. Ping Pong 2. Leaky Roof 3. Vacuum Salesman
programme.desc: The day to day events in the lives of a newly married couple. Each episode consists of three short, unrelated sketches in which characters often break the imaginary fourth wall. 1. Ping Pong 2. Leaky Roof 3. Vacuum Salesman

programme.title: Date With The Angels - S2E03: Everybody's Baby
programme.desc: The Time: 5 months after Vickie and Gus were married. The Main Character: One Stork. The Plot: Rock-a-Bye Boo Boo. The Angel's good friend is having a baby and everybody's at the hospital.

programme.title: Frontier Doctor - S1E07: Mystery of the Black Stallion
programme.desc: Two Eastern crooks try to run an insurance scam to victimize the owner of a valuable racehorse and fix a major horse race.

programme.title: Life With Elizabeth - S1E01: 1. Moose in the Kitchen 2. Jungle in the Living Room 3. Underhills for Dinner
programme.desc: The day to day events in the lives of a newly married couple. Each episode consists of three short, unrelated sketches in which characters often break the imaginary fourth wall. 1. Moose in the Kitchen 2. Jungle in the Living Room 3. Underhills for Dinner

programme.title: Dusty's Trail - S1E07: Then There Were Seven
programme.desc: A stage and a wagon heading west get separated from the rest of the wagon train thanks to Dusty. Now they must make their way to California.

programme.title: Date With The Angels - S1E09: The Blue Tie
programme.desc: Vicki goes to a department store to buy a gift for Gus and is unexpectedly asked to fill in as a sales clerk for a day. Gus is none too happy when he finds her on the job.

programme.title: Bonanza - S1E28: San Francisco
programme.desc: The Cartwrights, with Hop Sing, finish a cattle drive in San Francisco. Ben warns the other men of the dangers of the big city. Nevertheless, some of the men are careless and naive.

programme.title: Date With The Angels - S1E11: The Surprise
programme.desc: Gus has planned to surprise Vickie with a romantic trip to San Francisco for her birthday, but she has a few surprises of her own in store for him.

programme.title: Dusty's Trail - S1E01: Not So Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: The wagoners stop in a town that appears to have been abandoned very suddenly.

programme.desc: The day to day events in the lives of a newly married couple. Each episode consists of three short, unrelated sketches in which characters often break the imaginary fourth wall. 1. The Psychic 2. Car Repair for Dummies 3. Bird Bath

programme.title: Bonanza - S1E25: Escape to Ponderosa
programme.desc: Three deserters escaped from an Army stockade to the Ponderosa. When a Captain comes looking for them, Ben realizes what they've had to deal with and promises to let his good friend in charge of that fort know the real truth.

programme.title: Frontier Doctor - S1E10: The Desperate Game
programme.desc: Dr. Baxter's friend and mentor becomes involved in a scheme to issue phony death certificates to outlaws on the run. Dr. Baxter saves the day.

programme.title: Dusty's Trail - S1E03: Horse of Another Color
programme.desc: Dusty finds a stray horse and tames it, only to be arrested as a horse thief by a vigilante crew who wants to hang him in the morning.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Pat Gallagher and his sidekick Stoney Crockett are Secret Service agents in the Old West, dispatched by the government to investigate crimes threatening the young nation.

programme.title: Bonanza - S1E26: The Avenger
programme.desc: Ben and Adam are locked in jail, about to hung for a crime they didn't commit. Joe and Hoss must find out why the witnesses to the alleged crime have perjured themselves before the execution takes place. They receive help from an unexpected source, a drifter called Lassiter who is searching for the men who committed a lynching in Kansas years ago.

programme.desc: A ruthless young woman kills her rich grandfather and tries to frame Dr. Baxter (Rex Allen) for the crime.

programme.desc: A series of cave-ins at a gold mine leads to a confrontation between the mine owner and Dr.Baxter.

programme.desc: Three wanted men are holed up at a ranch house. They kidnap Dr. Baxter to treat one of the men who was shot during a robbery. A hostage, gunfights, and a chase lead to their demise.

programme.desc: Vickie gets the neighbors to sign a petition to stop the city from removing a tree from the parkway.

programme.title: Bonanza - S1E27: The Last Trophy
programme.desc: When an English couple comes to the Ponderosa on vacation, the beautiful wife slowly makes it clear that is no longer proud of her great hunter husband.

programme.title: Dusty's Trail - S1E02: There is Nothing Like A Dame
programme.desc: Two lonely outlaws in search of friendly girls kidnap Betsy and Lulu.

programme.title: Date With The Angels - S1E07: Shall we Dance?
programme.desc: The Time: 8 months after Vickie and Gus were married. The Community Boys Club is having a Modern Dance fund raiser, and Vickie and Gus get roped in to do an interpretive dance.

programme.title: Custer
programme.desc: In 1868, after the Civil War, Custer takes charge of a mix of ex-Confederates and criminals, the 7th Cavalry Regiment at Fort Hays, Kansas. programme.title: De Mente y Música
programme.desc: Perdió la memoria, pero la música era lo único que podía recuperarla.

programme.title: Manos Limpias
programme.desc: Sylvia intenta huir con sus hijos despues de que una redada policial expone el imperio de la droga de Eddie.

programme.title: Curse of Demon Mountain
programme.desc: Two former Confederate captains set-out to recover diamonds hidden in the mountains of Arkansas but a native spirit named Chikara is said to protect the sacred mountains against intruders.

programme.title: Secret Valley
programme.desc: Rancher entertains girl in Nevada to get a divorce. Then her gangster husband shows up.

programme.title: Pancho Villa
programme.desc: Mexican revolutionary Pancho Villa is double-crossed in an arms deal planned by his comrade Scotty. Villa and Scotty plot a raid on a U.S. cavalry fort in retaliation.

programme.title: Blazing Justice
programme.desc: A cowboy captures two rustlers and collects a $5000 reward. Using the money to take a vacation, he winds up getting accused of a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: Blazing Guns
programme.desc: After Slug Raton takes Brady's horse, hat, and gun, the Sheriff arrests Grady thinking he is the outlaw. Slug's men chase them to Ricard's ranch which they burn.

programme.title: The Drifter
programme.desc: A man known as The Drifter returns home to his cabin in the woods and winds up getting involved with an escaped convict, a gunfighter, lumber company rivals, mysterious family ties and murder.

programme.title: Jory
programme.desc: Jory is a fifteen-year-old boy who joins a horse-drive after his father is killed by a drunkard. The drive's leader and a likable cowhand take the boy under their wing, and find that tragedy has taught him how to take care of himself better than anyone could expect. Jory proves his new found manhood in the finale's thundering stampede and shootout.

programme.title: Billy The Kid Trapped
programme.desc: Stanton breaks Billy and his two friends Fuzzy and Jeff out of jail. He wants them free so three of his men can impersonate them for the robberies and murders he has planned.

programme.title: Rip Roarin' Buckaroo
programme.desc: Tyler, a boxer whose career ends after he loses a fixed fight, winds up with a job as a ranch hand. When his new boss gets involved with a crooked fight promoter, Tyler winds up back in the ring with a chance to vindicate himself.

programme.title: Blazing Frontier
programme.desc: In the 19th and last of the PRC "Billy the Kid" series (first six with Bob Steele and last 13 with Buster Crabbe), a feud develops between the settlers and the railroad detectives in Red Rock Valley.

programme.title: The Phantom Of The Range
programme.desc: A man has died leaving a fortune somewhere on his ranch. Brandon and his cohorts think a map is hidden in a picture frame. But when they bid on the picture at the auction, newcomer Jerry...

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan
programme.desc: The true story of Irish outlaw Daniel Morgan, who is wanted, dead or alive, in Australia during the 1850s.

programme.title: The Gatling Gun
programme.desc: Doctor Gatling invented a war machine to beat all arrows, and guns. Tough men, during hard times, battle for the ultimate weapon.

programme.title: Dakota 38
programme.desc: In the spring of 2005 Jim Miller a native spiritual leader and be it jam veteran found himself in a dream riding on horseback across the great plains of south Dakota just before he awoke he arrived at a riverbank in Minnesota and saw 38 of his Dakota ancestry.

programme.title: Powderkeg
programme.desc: Just before World War I, two adventurers are hired to bring back a hijacked train from Mexico.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Running from the law after a bank robbery in Mexico, Dad Longworth finds an opportunity to take the stolen gold and leave his partner Rio to be captured. Years later, Rio escapes from the prison where he has been since, and hunts down Dad for revenge. Dad is now a respectable sheriff in California, and has been living in fear of Rio's return.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Running from the law after a bank robbery in Mexico, Dad Longworth finds an opportunity to take the stolen gold and leave his partner Rio to be captured. Years later, Rio escapes from the prison where he has been since, and hunts down Dad for revenge. Dad is now a respectable sheriff in California, and has been living in fear of Rio's return.

programme.title: The Great Adventure
programme.desc: Set during the American Gold Rush era, this is an unforgettable tale of an orphaned boy and his wild dog who must battle against the Yukon wilderness and human greed to help save a frontier town.

programme.title: Between Fighting Men
programme.desc: Ken not only has to fight with his brother Wally over the girls, he has to try and stop the conflict between the cattlemen and the sheep men. It gets worse when Butch kills Judy's father.

programme.title: Boots And Saddles
programme.desc: When new owner Spud arrives from England, Autry convinces him not to sell the ranch but to raise horses for the Army. When both Autry's and Neale's bids are the same, the Colonel calls for a race to decide the winner. But that night Neale has Autry's stable burned.

programme.title: Gun Fight
programme.desc: On the stagecoach to Laramie, Wayne Santley rescues singer Nora Brown from the advances of gambler Cole Fender. In Laramie, Wayne discovers his brother Brad is an outlaw, but he refuses to...

programme.title: Winning Of The West
programme.desc: One of a bunch of gangsters trying to push the old protection racket on western ranchers turns out to be Gene's younger brother.

programme.title: Texas Cigar Roadshow
programme.desc: In this episode of Texas Cigar Roadshow, we‚Äôre joined by Dave Yancey for a cigar pairing with Los Statos and Shibui Japanese Single Grain Whiskey. I‚Äôm smoking the Los Statos Robusto from General Cigar Company, while Stephen enjoys an LFD Colorado Oscuro Short Robusto. We also stop by Ash Red for this week‚Äôs Shop Stop!

programme.title: Creekside Cigar Co.
programme.desc: Warped Cigars representative Scott Lewis joins the Creekside Podcast for a blind smoking session featuring well-aged cigars, including a 15-year-old selection and the Davidoff Oro Blanco Gordito.

programme.title: Cigar Essentials
programme.desc: Rachel and Howie G highlight the King's Palace soft travel humidor and the Liten dual-blade guillotine cutter.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Oliva Serie V 135th Anniversary Edición Limitada Perfecto cigar. They note the cigar's unique Perfecto shape and evaluate its wrapper, construction, and overall smoking experience.

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: Vito Vicente of London in Naples, Florida, is a cigar lounge offering a wide selection of premium cigars, personalized locker service, and a welcoming atmosphere with ample seating, both indoors and by a scenic pond.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: In this "Behind the Blend" episode, Belkys Sanchez, Regional Sales Manager for Crown Heads, shares her journey in the male-dominated cigar industry, covering her territory of Florida, Georgia, and Puerto Rico. She details the history and offerings of Crown Heads and Ozgener Family Cigars, emphasizing their quality and accessible price points, and highlights the Puerto Rican market's preference for larger ring gauges.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: Tucked away on 22 St at the heart of Ybor City, The Cabrera family opened a boutique Cigar shop in 2014. Ten years later, owner Vladimir Cabrera reflects on his personal journey and family business while showcasing a vast selection of premium cigars from around the world. Tune in to discover why Tampero Cigars is a straight cut above the rest!

programme.title: Creekside Cigar Co.
programme.desc: In this episode of the Creekside Podcast, hosts Dave, Noah, and Connor react to two "top 25 cigar lists" from 2024, starting at number 10 and working their way up, all while smoking a cigar blindfolded. They discuss various cigars from the lists, including the Davidoff Grand Cru Diademas Finas, Aganorsa Anniversario Maduro, Crowned Heads Los Calaveras, My Father No. 4, Plasencia Alma Fuerte Colorado Claro, and Quesada 50th Anniversary Toro, offering their unfiltered opinions and experiences with each. The episode culminates in the reveal of their blind-smoked cigar as the Dunbarton Tobacco and Trust Red Meat Lovers (a 6x60 box-pressed porterhouse), and a lively debate about the merits of "boutique" versus well-known brands on such lists, emphasizing that personal preference in cigars means "there's no right and wrong"

programme.title: Privada Cigar Club
programme.desc: Join Privada Cigar Club as we dive headfirst into Berlin, Germany!

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Bryan and Chris review the La Aroma de Cuba Monarch Toro, a 6x52 cigar with a Connecticut Broadleaf wrapper and Nicaraguan filler and binder.

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: In this special edition of Unrolled. Brain and Sean go head to head at handrolling their best cigars at El Reloj Cigar Factory.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: In this "Behind the Blend" episode, Belkys Sanchez, Regional Sales Manager for Crown Heads, shares her journey in the male-dominated cigar industry, covering her territory of Florida, Georgia, and Puerto Rico. She details the history and offerings of Crown Heads and Ozgener Family Cigars, emphasizing their quality and accessible price points, and highlights the Puerto Rican market's preference for larger ring gauges.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: On this episode of Cigar City Unrolled, owner of Long Ash Cigars - Mike- shows off his shop in the heart of Ybor city. Including his very own hand rolling station and aging room! Join us as we explore this unique style for a cigar lounge!

programme.title: Creekside Cigar Co.
programme.desc: Creekside Cigar Co. welcomes Jeff Amendola (Amendola Family Cigars) and Danny Bayron (DBL Cigars) for Part 1 of "The Man Behind Your Favorite Cigars." The conversation focuses on Danny Bayron's journey in the tobacco industry and the importance of having a good relationship with your factory.

programme.title: Privada Cigar Club
programme.desc: In this episode of the Privada, host Brian shares the January releases for the Limited Cigar Association (LCA) and the Rare Cigar Club, while also discussing industry drama and storage techniques. Key highlights include a "takeover" of the Rare Club featuring four cigars from Raul Lanusa, a young Nicaraguan manufacturer known for his specialized black Cameroon wrapper and micro-operations.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Hosts Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Romeo y Julieta Reserva Real Toro cigar. They note the cigar's smoothness and detail their scoring based on flavor, draw, and burn rate.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: In this episode of Unrolled, we visit Bennington Tobacconist with owner Jack Bennington. Join Jack as he takes us through his shop, sharing the history of the business, the unique cigar selections, and what makes Bennington Tobacconist a favorite destination for cigar enthusiasts.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," Sean Mobley interviews Rick Rodriguez, also known as "Chef Rick," from West Tampa Tobacco, who explains his nickname comes from blending tobacco like a chef uses food to create a desired flavor profile. Rick introduces new cigars like the "Circle of Life," a tribute to his mentors, and the "Double Crab," part of a Tampa-inspired trilogy, shaped like a "flying pig". He shares his personal journey into the cigar industry at age 40 and emphasizes that for him, cigars represent "connection" and a "gateway for a new friendship".

programme.title: Cigar Essentials
programme.desc: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard and Rachel G. introduce a versatile range of cigar maintenance and lifestyle accessories, including the industrial-style AWOLT travel case featuring a built-in punch, ashtray, and humidification system.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Bryan and Chris review the Island Jim by Oscar Natural. Known for its unique, "funky" appearance, cigar features a Nicaraguan Jalapa wrapper with a Honduran binder and filler

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: Miura Cigars in Miami is a unique cigar lounge and distribution center, specializing in hard-to-find and boutique cigars, while offering a wide selection of premium brands and actively engaging with the local community.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," host Sean Mobley sits down with Alex Weghorn, the Brand Activation Manager for Davidoff. Weghorn, who is a former space intelligence specialist for the Air Force, discusses his journey into the cigar industry and his role at Davidoff.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: In this episode of Unrolled, host Bryan Baiss visits the renowned Casa Perfecto lounge. Join Bryan as he takes you on a tour of this iconic lounge, exploring its atmosphere, cigar selection, and what makes it a must-visit spot for cigar lovers.

programme.title: Creekside Cigar Co.
programme.desc: This episode features Oliver Nevo from United Cigars, who shares insights into the brand's unique aging process in Spain and discusses the importance of hospitality in cigar lounges.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Oliva Serie V 135th Anniversary Edición Limitada Perfecto cigar. They note the cigar's unique Perfecto shape and evaluate its wrapper, construction, and overall smoking experience.

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: This episode explores Gurkha cigars' collaborative "Year of the Dragon 2024" series, featuring partnerships with master blenders and showcasing the brand's innovative packaging, promotional strategies, and dedication to the broader cigar community.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," host Sean Mobley sits down with Alex Weghorn, the Brand Activation Manager for Davidoff. Weghorn, who is a former space intelligence specialist for the Air Force, discusses his journey into the cigar industry and his role at Davidoff.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: Join us for an in-depth look at what it takes to turn tobacco leaves into a premium hand-rolled cigar at the El Rojo factory.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," Sean Mobley interviews Brian and George from Cavalier Cigars, who discuss their roles within the company, with Brian as a partner in the Honduran factory (FBT) and George as the sales representative for Florida and Puerto Rico. Brian shares his recent full-time move to Honduras, highlighting the country's beauty and the factory's unique practice of hand-applying gold leaf to cigars, a process where empowered employees can reject imperfect products.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Oliva Serie V 135th Anniversary Edición Limitada Perfecto cigar. They note the cigar's unique Perfecto shape and evaluate its wrapper, construction, and overall smoking experience.

programme.title: Cigar Essentials
programme.desc: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard G. and Rachel G. unbox and review five cigar accessories. They demonstrate a variety of tools, including a cedar-lined travel case kit , a digital humidometer , a rose-gold torch with an integrated cutter , and a set of protective mouthpieces. The show concludes with a heavy cast-iron monkey ashtray that vents smoke through its nostrils, with the hosts highlighting the unexpected affordability of all the products.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: The Traveling Roadshow brings leading cigar companies to retailers nationwide, showcasing new products and fostering community through direct engagement, emphasizing quality, innovation, and the shared passion for cigars.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Hosts Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Romeo y Julieta Reserva Real Toro cigar. They note the cigar's smoothness and detail their scoring based on flavor, draw, and burn rate.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: In this "Behind the Blend" episode, Belkys Sanchez, Regional Sales Manager for Crown Heads, shares her journey in the male-dominated cigar industry, covering her territory of Florida, Georgia, and Puerto Rico. She details the history and offerings of Crown Heads and Ozgener Family Cigars, emphasizing their quality and accessible price points, and highlights the Puerto Rican market's preference for larger ring gauges.

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: Go behind the counter at Old Times Cigars in Casselberry, Florida, with father-son owners Alan and Jonathan. Alan shares the story of how he transitioned from real estate to the cigar business in 1988, starting with a tiny shop in downtown Orlando's Church Street Station.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: In this episode of "Burn Rate," hosts Bryan and Chris Kelly review the Southern Draw Rose of Sharon, Dozen Roses, a Casa de Montecristo exclusive in a Salomon vitola. They praise its craftsmanship, noting the oily, thin-veined Ecuadorian Connecticut wrapper and consistent burn.

programme.title: Texas Cigar Roadshow
programme.desc: On this episode of Texas Cigar Roadshow, we‚Äôre enjoying the Kafie Boutique Small Batch San Andres in Toro. A smooth, flavorful cigar that‚Äôs perfect for our latest review!

programme.title: Creekside Cigar Co.
programme.desc: In this episode, the guys from Creekside Cigar Co. discuss some of their favorite cigar and bourbon pairings, including a bourbon they are drinking for the first time. They also answer questions from their viewers on Discord and Instagram, talk about a new cigar they've been smoking, and discuss a cigar brand's collaboration with the retailer.

programme.title: Cigar TV Original Documentaries
programme.desc: This documentary episode focuses on the Arturo Fuente cigar family and their legacy, particularly the creation of the Chateau de la Fuente and the highly sought-after OpusX cigar. The story traces the Fuente family's origins in Tampa, Florida, starting in 1912 , to their eventual move to the Dominican Republic. It emphasizes the family's passion, perseverance, and dedication to producing premium cigars despite challenges like the Cuban Revolution. The episode highlights their commitment to employees and community through initiatives like the Cigar Family Charitable Foundation.

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: Miura Cigars in Miami is a unique cigar lounge and distribution center, specializing in hard-to-find and boutique cigars, while offering a wide selection of premium brands and actively engaging with the local community.

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: Miura Cigars in Miami is a unique cigar lounge and distribution center, specializing in hard-to-find and boutique cigars, while offering a wide selection of premium brands and actively engaging with the local community.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: Frank Depinto is excited to show you around Casa De Monte Cristo. Highlighting a wonderful drink menu and a fully stocked humidor, Frank explores the complexity and nuanced differences between a cigar and car.

programme.title: Cigar TV Original Documentaries
programme.desc: A new documentary, "Women of the PCA," highlights the growing influence of women in the premium cigar industry, featuring interviews with key figures and footage from events in Tampa, Florida.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: On this episode of Unrolled, we take a look at The Cigar Castle! General Manager Rick is here to show us this unique lounge with a wide variety of selection and an impressive humidor!

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Bryan and Chris, the discerning palates behind Burn Rate, turn their attention to the Grandeur Cremo cigar. They'll meticulously analyze its blend, construction, and smoking characteristics, offering their experienced insights into this intriguing offering.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: In this episode of Unrolled, host Bryan Baiss visits the renowned Casa Perfecto lounge. Join Bryan as he takes you on a tour of this iconic lounge, exploring its atmosphere, cigar selection, and what makes it a must-visit spot for cigar lovers.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," host Sean Mobley sits down with Alex Weghorn, the Brand Activation Manager for Davidoff. Weghorn, who is a former space intelligence specialist for the Air Force, discusses his journey into the cigar industry and his role at Davidoff.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: A hidden gem in the heart of Tampa. Known for its inviting atmosphere and extensive selection of premium cigars, Sterling offers both seasoned aficionados and curious newcomers a place to unwind. The episode dives into the lounge's history, the art of cigar pairing, and the vibrant community it fosters.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: Alex Gonzalez and Jared Burrows of BESA Cigars discuss the brand's origins, including the Cuban-born Mark's idea to create an Albanian cigar, and dive into their Media San Andreas and Maduro blends. They cover their approach to packaging, marketing, and the importance of engaging with their audience in a fun, relatable way.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: The Traveling Roadshow brings leading cigar companies to retailers nationwide, showcasing new products and fostering community through direct engagement, emphasizing quality, innovation, and the shared passion for cigars.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: Join us as we take a behind the scenes tour of Florida's largest independent tobacco farm. Jeff Borysiewicz guides us through his tobacco farm, sharing tricks of the trade and everything that goes into the process of producing high quality cigar tobacco.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: Join host Sean Mobley as he sits down with the esteemed cigar maker, Chantel Leavitt, offering unique insights into the meticulous art of blending and the dedication required to craft exceptional cigars. Discover the inspiration behind Bella Dama's signature creations and gain a deeper appreciation for the nuances that define a truly remarkable smoke.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: In this episode of Unrolled, we visit Bennington Tobacconist with owner Jack Bennington. Join Jack as he takes us through his shop, sharing the history of the business, the unique cigar selections, and what makes Bennington Tobacconist a favorite destination for cigar enthusiasts.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Bryan and Chris, your trusted tobacco experts, tackle the unique Drew Estate Year of the Rat cigar. They'll dissect its distinctive blend, construction, and flavor nuances, offering their seasoned perspectives on this celebrated release. Tune in to see if this Year of the Rat lives up to the hype and earns their stamp of approval.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: Tucked away on 22 St at the heart of Ybor City, The Cabrera family opened a boutique Cigar shop in 2014. Ten years later, owner Vladimir Cabrera reflects on his personal journey and family business while showcasing a vast selection of premium cigars from around the world. Tune in to discover why Tampero Cigars is a straight cut above the rest!

programme.title: Cigar Essentials
programme.desc: In this second episode of Cigar Essentials on Cigar TV, Howard G. and Rachel G. showcase five more cigar accessories, ranging from durable travel gear to luxury gift items. They explore various tools including a weatherproof travel humidor, a high-end dual cutter, and a specialized infusion vessel for flavoring cigars with spirits. The episode highlights the practicality and design of these products, emphasizing their value as personal essentials or professional gifts.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Hosts Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Romeo y Julieta Reserva Real Toro cigar. They note the cigar's smoothness and detail their scoring based on flavor, draw, and burn rate.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Join seasoned tobacco authorities Bryan and Chris as they put the highly anticipated Cohiba Riviera under the microscope. Expect a detailed breakdown of its construction, flavor profile, and overall smoking experience.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: In this episode of Behind the Blend, Sean interviews Willy Marante, the national sales manager and East Coast representative for La Aurora Cigars. Willy discusses La Aurora's history as one of the oldest brands in the Dominican Republic, celebrating 122 years, and highlights key products like the newly redesigned 100 Años and the colorful Preferidos lines. He shares insights into his journey from a career in music to cigar sales, the importance of grassroots marketing for small brands, and how the cigar industry fosters a sense of community that transcends social and professional backgrounds.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: On this episode of Burn Rate, hosts Bryan Baiss and Chris Kelly review the Undercrown 10 by Drew Estate Toro, evaluating its craftsmanship and flavor profile which featured dry cherry and black pepper, noting a consistently burning cigar despite its initial dryness.

programme.title: Cigar Essentials
programme.desc: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard and Rachel G. showcase a variety of cigar accessories, including a high-quality acrylic humidor, a cedar-lined leather travel case, and lead-free crystal pairing glasses.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: Join host Sean Mobley as he sits down with Maurice Mears, the founder of JM Patriarch Cigars. In this episode, Maurice shares the story and inspiration behind his line of cigars, delving into the blends, tobacco selections, and the philosophy that drives the JM Patriarch brand. Get an inside look at the passion and dedication that goes into crafting these distinguished smokes.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: In this episode of "Burn Rate," hosts Bryan and Chris Kelly review the Southern Draw Rose of Sharon, Dozen Roses, a Casa de Montecristo exclusive in a Salomon vitola. They praise its craftsmanship, noting the oily, thin-veined Ecuadorian Connecticut wrapper and consistent burn.

programme.title: Cigar TV Original Documentaries
programme.desc: The Women of the PCA gather in Washington, D.C for meetings on Capitol Hill to discuss issues impacting their industry, such as regulations, taxes, and the artisan nature of premium cigars. It captures the voices of retailers, manufacturers, and industry supporters and details their efforts to inform lawmakers about the economic and cultural importance of premium cigars and the potential negative impact of proposed laws.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: In this episode of Unrolled, we take a tour of Estate Cigars and Social with owner Jonathon Waterman. Join Jonathon as he shows us around his lounge, sharing the story behind the space, the cigar offerings, and what makes Estate Cigars a standout in the cigar community.

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: Vito Vicente of London in Naples, Florida, is a cigar lounge offering a wide selection of premium cigars, personalized locker service, and a welcoming atmosphere with ample seating, both indoors and by a scenic pond.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: On this episode of Cigar City Unrolled, owner of Long Ash Cigars - Mike- shows off his shop in the heart of Ybor city. Including his very own hand rolling station and aging room! Join us as we explore this unique style for a cigar lounge!

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: Sean lights up a conversation with Law Ream of Zino Cigars. Beyond his celebrated reviews, Law shares his journey into the world of cigar criticism, his unique methodology for dissecting a blend, and what he believes truly makes a cigar worthy of his praise.

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: Isabela's Bar Cuba in St. Augustine is a unique cigar lounge and bar offering a curated selection of rare and premium cigars within a comfortable, home-like atmosphere, all while celebrating Cuban heritage and fostering strong community connections.

programme.title: Cigar Essentials
programme.desc: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard and Rachel G. explore high-end cigar accessories, highlighting the industrial-style AWOLT travel case with its built-in ashtray and the compact Govee smart hygrometer for precise remote monitoring.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: In this special edition of Unrolled. Brain and Sean go head to head at handrolling their best cigars at El Reloj Cigar Factory.

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: In this special edition of Unrolled. Brain and Sean go head to head at handrolling their best cigars at El Reloj Cigar Factory.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: Sean sits down with Lynn Hawkins of Placencia Cigars, one of the most respected names in the industry. Lynn pulls back the curtain on Placencia's extensive history as a leading grower and producer, sharing insights into their meticulous tobacco cultivation, the intricate art of their cigar manufacturing process, and what makes their family's legacy truly stand out in the world of premium cigars.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: Join us for an in-depth look at what it takes to turn tobacco leaves into a premium hand-rolled cigar at the El Rojo factory.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Bryan and Chris review the Island Jim by Oscar Natural. Known for its unique, "funky" appearance, cigar features a Nicaraguan Jalapa wrapper with a Honduran binder and filler

programme.title: Cigar TV Original Documentaries
programme.desc: Tampa Cigar Week 2025 offers an immersive experience for cigar enthusiasts, featuring VIP tastings and pairings with premium cigars and spirits, along with various events aimed at celebrating and educating attendees on Tampa's rich cigar culture.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: This episode of Behind The Blend features Lou Cross, owner of Lure Cigars , to discuss the inspiration and blend behind his brand. Cross shares the moving story behind his cigar line, named as a tribute to his late father.

programme.title: Cigar Essentials
programme.desc: Hosts Howard and Rachel G. showcase several travel and maintenance accessories, including the AWOLT Travel Cigar Case, which features a portable ashtray and humidification component, and the Govee Smart Thermo-Hygrometer for remote monitoring via Bluetooth.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," Sean Mobley interviews Rick Rodriguez, also known as "Chef Rick," from West Tampa Tobacco, who explains his nickname comes from blending tobacco like a chef uses food to create a desired flavor profile. Rick introduces new cigars like the "Circle of Life," a tribute to his mentors, and the "Double Crab," part of a Tampa-inspired trilogy, shaped like a "flying pig". He shares his personal journey into the cigar industry at age 40 and emphasizes that for him, cigars represent "connection" and a "gateway for a new friendship".

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Brian and Chris review the Knuckle Sandwich Short Churchill by Espinosa. The guys analyze the flavor, burn, and smoke of this Ecuadorian Connecticut cigar, discussing whether celebrity-backed brands live up to the hype or fall flat.

programme.title: Cigar Essentials
programme.desc: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard G. and Rachel G. unbox and review five cigar accessories. programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: A beloved local institution steeped in tradition. Known for its hand-rolled cigars and authentic Cuban heritage, La Faraona offers a unique glimpse into the craft of cigar making. The episode dives into the shop's history, its role in the Ybor community.

programme.title: Burn Rate
programme.desc: Bryan and Chris review the La Aroma de Cuba Monarch Toro, a 6x52 cigar with a Connecticut Broadleaf wrapper and Nicaraguan filler and binder.

programme.title: Unrolled
programme.desc: This episode explores Quality Importers, a comprehensive provider of cigar accessories, showcasing their diverse product lines, in-house customization services, and new "Conspiracy" cigar brand, all built on a foundation of strategic acquisitions and a passion for the cigar lifestyle.

programme.title: Behind The Blend
programme.desc: Join host Sean Mobley as he sits down with Maurice Mears, the founder of JM Patriarch Cigars. Get an inside look at the passion and dedication that goes into crafting these distinguished smokes.

programme.title: Cigar City Unrolled
programme.desc: Join us for this episode of Cigar City Unrolled, as we explore the inviting ambiance of JR Outlet cigar lounge in Tampa, led by owner, Mike. As he guides us through the lounge, Mike shares his passion for cigars, highlights the unique features of the space, and introduces some of the most sought-after blends available at great discounted prices

programme.desc: On this episode of Burn Rate, hosts Bryan and Chris review the Romacraft Neanderthal HS in a Corona Extra vitola. They analyze the cigar's complex, multi-national blend and its unique flat-head craftsmanship.

programme.title: Ministerio de Brujas: el primer gobierno astral de la historia #astrologia #esoterismo #tarot
programme.desc: Bienvenidas, bienvenidos y bienvenides al Ministerio de Brujas, el nuevo programa del Canal Barro donde la intuición, el arte y la magia se sientan a la misma mesa. Este primer episodio es un aquelarre de verdad: fuego, deseo, política, feminismo y mucho humor. Las ministras @chongazen, @marianaenvozalta y @zakurapill abren las puertas del ministerio con un comunicado oficial: “El Ministerio de Brujas no es un edificio ni un expediente. Es un estado de ánimo. Es ese rincón donde las brujas nos reunimos para decir lo que nadie dice, para reírnos de lo serio y darle seriedad a lo que parece una pavada.” En este primer encuentro: - Protocolo de la Hoguera: adiós a los políticos, los alquileres imposibles, los machirulos, los vampiros energéticos y los hombres de Cáncer. Todo lo que sobra… se quema y se transmuta. - Secretaría de Venus en Tanga: astrología y erotismo sin censura. ¿Qué energía nos mueve en esta luna llena de Aries? - Boletín Oficial de Movimientos Planetarios: ChongaZen trae el parte astrológico del cielo y sus efectos terrenales. - Departamento de Estrellas y Sábanas: compatibilidades cósmicas. Hoy: Penélope Cruz y Javier Bardem. - Dirección de Cinematografía Zodiazal: la Dra. Fernanda Garrido recomienda películas según los elementos zodiacales. - Archivos Clasificados de Brujas: homenaje a Violeta Parra, la artista chilena que convirtió su dolor en himno y su rebeldía en legado eterno. Aquí no hay jerarquías ni jefes: mandan las palabras, la energía y la conexión. Si entraste, ya eres parte del aquelarre.

programme.title: Hablemos claro de la menopausia con Celia Sancho en Matronas al Rescate.
programme.desc: Bienvenida a Matronas al Rescate, el programa donde se habla claro, se ríe fuerte y se normaliza lo que nadie quiere nombrar. En este episodio, las matronas se enfrentan a un tema que llega antes de lo que crees: la menopausia y la perimenopausia. Para ello, invitan a Celia Sancho, una experta que viene a explicar (sin drama ni eufemismos) qué pasa realmente cuando el cuerpo cambia de guion.

programme.title: ¿Las pantallas están criando a tus hijos? Sol Macaluso y Fátima de Francisco en Matronas al Rescate
programme.desc: uevo programa de Matronas al Rescate en Canal Barro — y esta vez tocamos uno de los temas más urgentes: cómo las pantallas, las redes sociales y la inteligencia artificial están afectando a la infancia. Las invitadas de lujo fueron:

programme.title: Matronas: prematuros, alimentos y un 1,2,3 divertido para explicar los básicos de nutrición
programme.desc: Nuevo jueves en Matronas al Rescate (todos los jueves a las 11:00h en @CanalBarro y venimos cargadas de temas que importan, que ayudan y que, sí, también hacen reír. En este episodio hablamos de: ✨ Día Mundial del Prematuro — Atención especializada, UCIN, apoyo emocional y derechos que aún faltan. — La revolución del útero artificial. — Cómo afectan los disruptores endocrinos.

programme.title: ¿Las pantallas están criando a tus hijos? Sol Macaluso y Fátima de Francisco en Matronas al Rescate
programme.desc: uevo programa de Matronas al Rescate en Canal Barro — y esta vez tocamos uno de los temas más urgentes: cómo las pantallas, las redes sociales y la inteligencia artificial están afectando a la infancia. Las invitadas de lujo fueron:

programme.title: La carta astral de Pedro Sanchez y Begoña Gómez I Begoña es la que manda I Ministerio de Brujas
programme.desc: Este martes en Ministerio de Brujas (19:00h España, en Canal Barro), las ministras abrieron los portales del poder para leer las cartas astrales de Pedro Sánchez y Begoña Gómez

programme.title: PINKS 2.0 - S1E1
programme.desc: It’s been 20 years in the making — the return of the drag racing reality TV show that started it all. New host Bruno Massel. New network. Built by automotive enthusiasts, for automotive enthusiasts. In Episode 1, we take you along for the full journey — from the origins of PINKS racing to today’s PINKS 2.0 competition at Rockingham Dragway. You’ll meet the racers who put it all on the line and step into the legendary PINKS Circle. The road wasn’t easy. Breakdowns, setbacks, and hurdles stood in the way, and every racer had to fight just to make it to the track and earn their shot to compete. Sit back and enjoy the ride as we bring you PINKS 2.0.

programme.desc: It’s been 20 years in the making — the return of the drag racing reality TV show that started it all. New host Bruno Massel. New network. Built by automotive enthusiasts, for automotive enthusiasts. In Episode 1, we take you along for the full journey — from the origins of PINKS racing to today’s PINKS 2.0 competition at Rockingham Dragway. You’ll meet the racers who put it all on the line and step into the legendary PINKS Circle. The road wasn’t easy. Breakdowns, setbacks, and hurdles stood in the way, and every racer had to fight just to make it to the track and earn their shot to compete. Sit back and enjoy the ride as we bring you PINKS 2.0.

programme.title: Border Budget Buildoff - PINKS
programme.desc: Brought to you by Powertrain Products - Watch Shaun “Nooo Waaay” Umshied represent Canada as he goes head-to-head with Justin “Danger” Nunley repping the USA in an all-out cross-border showdown.
